word: G2071 - ἔσομαι - ésomai - es'-om-ahee - Shall be

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἔσομαι

- Transliteration: Esomai

- Phonetic: es'-om-ahee

- Definition:

1. future first person singular of "to be"

- Origin: future of G1510

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Future tense of G1510; will be: - shall (should) be (have) (shall) come (to pass) X may have X fall what would follow X live long X sojourn.
